description: A vertical 'LABOR NEWS' announcement card. The top has a navy-blue banner with 'LABOR NEWS' in white serif (bold 'LABOR', italic 'NEWS'). Below, over a navy-tinted area watermarked with a faint DOL seal, the white serif headline reads 'US Department of Labor awards $1.5M to provide resources for Fort Bliss service members transitioning to civilian life,' with the date 'April 17, 2025' in italic. The lower portion is a color photograph of the entrance to a U.S. Army installation: a tan masonry sign reading 'United States Army Fort Bliss' stands at left beside a roadway leading to a 'WELCOME TO FT. BLISS' gate canopy, with cars and desert landscaping. This is a designed government news-promotion graphic announcing a DOL grant, combining branded typography with a relevant location photo. Intent: publicize DOL funding supporting transitioning service members; audience is veterans, military families, and the general public.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS; US Department of Labor awards $1.5M to provide resources for Fort Bliss service members transitioning to civilian life; April 17, 2025; United States Army Fort Bliss; WELCOME TO FT. BLISS
